title: TN31 7TE, Tradebe Solvent Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3437PL/V018
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Tradebe Solvent Recycling Limited Installation name: Rye Process Plant Permit number: EPR/GP3437PL/V018  "
